top_signals.title: Oil prices fall on hopes of Strait of Hormuz reopening
top_signals.summary: Biggest monthly decline in Brent crude since 2020 comes amid signs US and Iran could be close to a deal
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New Zealand budget spares defense, intelligence agencies from cuts
top_signals.summary: “The rules-based global system is under strain. Countries are boosting their spending on defense," said Finance Minister Nicola Willis.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Muni Funds Lure Near-Record Cash as Reinvestment Season Nears
top_signals.summary: Investors are pouring money back into municipal bonds as higher yields and the approaching summer reinvestment season draw cash into the tax-exempt market.

top_signals.title: Google Chrome adds session cookie theft protection for all users
top_signals.summary: Google says the Chrome Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC) security feature is now generally available and is rolling out to all users to prevent account takeovers. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
